news.summary: Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) disclosed today in Toronto that at the 2025 Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders, following shareholder approval, the company's upcoming actions were solidified.
news.headline: Allied Gold consolidates shares in preparation to list on NYSE post approval at 2025 meeting.

news.summary: In Munich on May 8, 2025, Envision Energy, a prominent player in green technology, unveiled its 2025 Net Zero Action Report at the Smarter E Europe event. The report highlights the company's dedication to climate leadership. Envision Energy marked a significant milestone by attaining operational carbon neutrality for the third time.
news.headline: Envision Energy unveils 2025 Net Zero Report at Smarter E Europe, celebrates third year of carbon neutrality.

news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on May 8, 2025, Angel MedFlight Worldwide Air Ambulance has revealed that their CEO and President, Christine Aguilera, has been selected as a finalist for the respected Ernst & Young LLP (EY US) Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025 award.
news.headline: Angel MedFlight CEO Christine Aguilera is a finalist for Ernst & Young Entrepreneur Of The Year® 2025, announced on May 8, 2025.

news.summary: In Houston, Geospace has disclosed its second quarter fiscal year 2025 outcomes with a revenue of $18.0 million, amid which the company experienced a net loss of ($9.8) million, translating to $(0.77) per diluted share.
news.headline: Geospace Technologies Corp reports Q2FY25 revenue of $18.0 million, with a net loss of ($9.8) million.

news.summary: In Seattle on May 8, 2025, Alaska Air Group, Inc. revealed the appointment of Pete Shimer to their board of directors, succeeding Ken Thompson following his retirement after a quarter-century of service. Shimer, who initially joined as an auditor, has served in various C-suite roles throughout his career.
news.headline: Alaska Air Group appoints Pete Shimer to board, replacing Ken Thompson after 25 years of service.

news.summary: LEQVIO represents a major breakthrough in managing hypercholesterolemia, especially for patients who have not reached their target LDL-C levels despite being on the highest tolerated statin therapy. Serving as the initial FDA-endorsed siRNA treatment for reducing LDL-C levels, it brings forth a new mechanism of action.
news.headline: LEQVIO leads in cholesterol-lowering therapies in 7 markets. First FDA-approved siRNA therapy for LDL-C reduction.

news.summary: Autoliv, Inc., a global leader in automotive safety systems, disclosed the outcomes of its yearly general stockholders' gathering on May 8, 2025. The meeting discussed the company's performance in the determined period. Autoliv, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol ALV and on the SSE as ALIV.sdb.
news.headline: Autoliv reports results of 2025 annual stockholders meeting on May 8. Leader in safety systems, stockholders' meeting held.

news.summary: A legal action has been filed against Brookfield Asset Management alleging fraudulent activities, attempted bribery, and unjustly restricting investment opportunities in a company associated with Elon Musk. The lawsuit highlights serious claims against the company concerning financial misconduct and interference in investment activities. This legal dispute raises significant concerns and underscores the complexities surrounding the operations of Brookfield Asset Management in relation to Elon Musk's ventures. The case brings to light potential illicit practices and controversial actions that may have impacted the investment landscape.
news.headline: Investor linked to Musk battles asset manager over fraud and bribery allegations, limiting investments.
EL SALVADOR BUYS MORE BITCOIN: THE BITCOIN OFFICE

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, U.S. Global Investors, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. The company, listed as NASDAQ: GROW, reported $2.1 million in operating revenues. However, they also declared a net loss of $382,000, translating to a loss of $0.03 per share. U.S. Global Investors, Inc. is a registered investment advisory firm renowned for its extensive experience in global markets and specialized sectors.
news.headline: U.S. Global Investors reports Q3 2025 operating revenues of $2.1 million with a net loss of $382,000; initiates strategy to increase Bitcoin investment.

news.summary: Today in Toronto, on May 8, 2025, Allied Gold Corporation (TSX: AAUC) (OTCQX: AAUCF) revealed the outcome of the votes tallied during its annual and special shareholder meeting. The meeting addressed crucial matters including the election of directors, the selection of auditors, and the endorsement of various proposals. Shareholders decisively participated in the decision-making process, emphasizing their interest in the company's governance and financial matters.
news.headline: Allied Gold (TSX: AAUC) reports voting results from annual meeting. Shareholders voted on directors, auditors, and other business.

news.summary: In Toronto on May 8, 2025, Tucows Inc., a prominent global internet services provider, released its unaudited financial results for the first quarter ending on March 31, 2025. The company's stocks are listed as NASDAQ: TCX and TSX: TC. The financial data presented is in U.S. dollars. Following a successful four-year period of revenue expansion, Tucows Inc. expressed satisfaction with its performance.
news.headline: Tucows reports strong Q1 with gains in revenue, gross profit and Adjusted EBITDA. Figures in U.S. dollars.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, in Palm Beach, Florida, Exec Edge introduced Exec Edge Research to the public. This new platform will release in-depth initiation notes and quarterly updates. Exec Edge Research specializes in analyzing US and worldwide stocks, providing valuable insights for investors. This initiative aims to enhance decision-making processes and discussion within the realm of equities market.
news.headline: Exec Edge Research to cover FLD, CLYM, STKS, REX, ACB. Specialized in US and global equities. Quarterly updates. May 8, 2025.

news.summary: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE American: IOR) has released its financial performance for the quarter ending on March 31, 2025. During this period, the company reported a net income of $1.0 million for common shares, equating to $0.24 per diluted share. This marks a decrease from the net income of $1.2 million, or $0.29 per share, in the corresponding quarter of 2024. The decline in net income is primarily due to a decrease in interest income.
news.headline: Income Opportunity Realty Investors, Inc. reports Q1 2025 net income $1.0M, down from $1.2M in Q1 2024 due to decrease in interest income.

news.summary: In the latest quarter ending March 31, 2025, Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE: TCI) disclosed financial results. The net income attributed to common shares tallied $4.6 million or $0.53 per diluted share, a notable increase from the previous year's $2.5 million or $0.30 per diluted share for the same period in 2024. Total occupancy across properties was at 80% as of March 31, 2025, segmented into 94% for multifamily properties and 53% for others.
news.headline: Transcontinental Realty Investors, Inc. reports Q1 2025 net income of $4.6M, $2.1M higher than Q1 2024; total occupancy 80%.

news.summary: In Dallas, American Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE: ARL) has released its operational outcomes for the quarter ending March 31, 2025. During this quarter, the net income attributable to common shares stood at $3.0 million, equivalent to $0.18 per diluted share. This reflects a notable increase from the figures reported for the same period in 2024, which were $1.8 million or $0.11 per diluted share. Noteworthy financial statistics for this period include a total occupancy rate of 80% as of March 31, 2025, with a breakdown of 94% occupancy rate for multifamily properties and 53% for other properties.
news.headline: American Realty Investors, Inc. (NYSE: ARL) reports Q1, 2025 earnings with $3.0 million net income, $0.18 per share, 80% total occupancy.
Let’s get real about If your life was on the line, would you trust an AI to be your doctor?

news.summary: In a recent statement released by Gina Strum's legal team in New York on May 8, 2025, they addressed the ongoing lawsuit against Marc Lasry. The lawsuit alleges years of sexual harassment and retaliation by Lasry towards Strum. According to the statement, Strum's career advancement was dependent on her ability to endure Lasry's unwanted advances. The exact duration of the alleged misconduct and the specific instances were not disclosed in the statement. The lawsuit is seeking compensation for the damages caused by the harassment and retaliation experienced by Strum. The legal proceedings are still underway, with both parties continuing to present their arguments in court.
news.headline: Gina Strum sues ex-Milwaukee Bucks owner Marc Lasry for $100M over sexual misconduct, retaliation, smear campaign.

news.summary: Shift4 Payments, Inc. has disclosed that its subsidiaries, Shift4 Payments, LLC and Shift4 Payments Finance Sub, Inc., have successfully priced an offering of €680 million in 5.500% senior notes due 2033 (the “Euro Notes”) and $550 million in 6.750% senior notes due 2032 (the “New 2032 Notes”). The total aggregate principal amount for both notes combined reaches €680 million and $550 million. Shift4 Payments is recognized as a leader in integrated payments and commerce technology.
news.headline: Shift4 announces pricing of €680 million Senior Notes due 2033 and $550 million Senior Notes due 2032.

news.summary: After completing restructuring, Biora has transitioned into a privately held firm, equipped with long-term funding aimed at expediting the advancement of the BioJet™ platform.
news.headline: Biora Therapeutics completes restructuring process, now privately held; aims to speed up BioJet™ platform development.

news.summary: Federal Reserve Chairman, Jerome Powell, is seeking a better understanding of the Trump administration's plans before considering a rate cut. However, he may not have the time to wait for such clarity. The focus now lies on what Powell will communicate to the S&P 500 to ensure market stability.
news.headline: Fed Chair Jerome Powell seeks Trump agenda clarity before rate cut, but may not have luxury. S&P 500 awaits guidance. (Character count: 117)

news.summary: AS PRFoods, with registration code 11560713 and located at Pärnu mnt 141, Tallinn 11314, has recommended to its shareholders the adoption of resolutions without holding a meeting following § 299 1 of the Commercial Code. The company's ISIN is EE3100101031.
news.headline: PRFoods proposes adopting resolutions without shareholder meeting. Prfood's registration code: 11560713. Address: Pärnu mnt 141, Tallinn 11314.

news.summary: A prominent travel marketplace and artificial intelligence (AI) technology firm, Mondee, has recently undergone an acquisition and recapitalization process. The acquisition and recapitalization have brought substantial changes to Mondee, ensuring its growth and expansion in the industry.
news.headline: Mondee acquired by Tabhi post Chapter 11; Boosts liquidity and capital structure for AI tech firm.

news.summary: In 2025, Federal Reserve officials anticipate implementing two rate cuts as unemployment rates are expected to rise and a temporary spike in inflation is projected. The Federal Reserve's outlook is described as dovish, and they foresee gradual economic growth alongside short-lived inflation caused by tariffs. Despite the cautious stance of the Fed, the S&P 500 index saw a surge in value.
news.headline: Fed predicts 2 rate cuts in 2025 due to slow growth, 'transitory' inflation; S&P 500 rallies.

news.summary: In February, the Federal Reserve's preferred measure of inflation showed an increase. This comes as the S&P 500 futures declined ahead of the impending tariffs under the Trump administration.
news.headline: Fed's inflation gauge rose in February, before Trump tariffs hit; S&P 500 futures slipped.

news.summary: If reciprocal tariffs and an additional 50% tax on Chinese imports are implemented at midnight, Trump's tariffs could reach near the $1 trillion tax hike mark. The S&P 500 has already taken a downward turn in response to this news.
news.headline: Trump tariff impact: $1 trillion tax hike imminent at midnight, affecting S&P 500 negatively.

news.summary: A recent report states that the unemployment rate has dropped to 3.9%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The report also reveals that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the last month, with the strongest growth seen in the healthcare and technology sectors. Additionally, the average hourly wages have increased by 3.2% compared to last year. Experts believe that these numbers indicate a strong and healthy job market and suggest positive economic growth in the near future.
news.headline: Company explores options for future growth strategies after revenue dropped 15% last quarter.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Vincerx Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: VINC) from San Mateo, California, announced the termination of a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Global Digital Holdings Inc., which operates as QumulusAI, for a potential merger.
news.headline: Vincerx Pharma (Nasdaq: VINC) ends LOI with Global Digital Holdings Inc. for potential merger, opts for wind-down activities.

news.summary: The increasing Treasury yields are prompting concerns of a recession, potentially necessitating intervention from the Federal Reserve. As Trump's tariffs continue to affect the market, the 10-year Treasury yield has surged, while the S&P 500 faces downward pressure. The Federal Reserve is considering taking action to address the economic instability caused by these events.
news.headline: Federal Reserve may intervene as 10-Year Treasury yields spike due to Trump tariffs, risking recession.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Clear Blue Technologies International Inc. (TSXV: CBLU) (FRA: 0YA) (OTCQB: CBUTF) announced updated terms of their Financing Agreements with RE Royalties. The adjustments aim to improve the financial arrangement between the two entities.
news.headline: Clear Blue Technologies (TSXV: CBLU) strengthens platform for growth after completing balance sheet restructuring.

news.summary: In a surprising turn, consumer prices experienced an unexpected decrease, with core inflation reaching its lowest point in four years. This decline was exacerbated by the impact of Trump's tariffs, particularly affecting the travel sector. As a result, the S&P 500 witnessed a sharp decrease in value.
news.headline: Consumer prices decrease, core inflation at 4-year low; S&P 500 plunges due to Trump tariffs impact.

news.summary: The recent transfer of the Hawthorne Collective highlights a strategic shift towards separating cannabis assets and enhancing growth within the core lawn and garden sector. This move emphasizes a clear division between the cannabis and non-cannabis segments of the business, signaling a concentrated effort to drive expansion in the primary lawn and garden operations. This strategic adjustment aims to leverage the company's strengths and capitalize on opportunities for growth in the core business sector, underlining a commitment to maximizing potential in this area.
news.headline: ScottsMiracle-Gro transfers Hawthorne Collective to separate cannabis business, emphasizing growth in lawn and garden sector.

news.summary: On Friday, Treasury yields continued to rise while the dollar weakened. This shift suggests a potential reversal in America's status as the top global capital hub. Despite Trump's tariffs reprieve, Treasury yields and the dollar faced a confidence crisis. The S&P 500 saw a rebound amidst this uncertainty.
news.headline: Treasury yields rise, dollar falls despite Trump tariffs reprieve. S&P 500 rebounds. Global capital trends shift.

news.summary: Retail sales in March saw a significant increase as consumers hurried to purchase automobiles and Apple iPhones prior to the enforcement of Trump tariffs. This surge resulted in the highest jump in two years. Alongside this, the S&P 500 experienced a decline.
news.headline: Retail sales surged by most in 2 years as customers rushed to purchase autos and iPhones ahead of Trump tariffs; S&P 500 declined.

news.summary: Toronto, April 10, 2025 - Currency Exchange International, Corp. (CXI), a company listed on TSX under CXI and OTC under CURN, revealed a referral agreement with CCE, a prominent foreign exchange services retailer in Canada. CCE, a subsidiary of DUCA established in 1954, boasts 19 branches in Ontario and provides various services like digital products, foreign exchange conversions, and money transfers in 120 currencies. DUCA has evolved from a single credit union in Toronto to 19 branches in the GTA and Central Ontario, with 93,000 members and total assets exceeding $8.3 billion, including managed assets.
news.headline: Currency Exchange Int'l partners with Continental Currency Exchange, offers services in 120 currencies across 19 branches in Ontario. DUCA's subsidiary has 93K members, $8.3B total assets.

news.summary: Jerome Powell, the head of the Federal Reserve, suggested that the tariffs imposed by President Trump could present difficulties, as they put pressure on the Fed's goals of managing inflation and fostering economic expansion. This statement by Powell led to a decline in the Dow Jones index.
news.headline: Fed Chief Powell warns of challenges from Trump tariffs on inflation and growth; Dow Jones drops.

news.summary: Fortuna Mining Corp. has recently finalized a deal to sell its ownership in Roxgold Sanu SA, the company operating the Yaramoko Mine, alongside its three other wholly-owned Burkina Faso subsidiaries, to Soleil Resources International Limited. The agreement, which marks the end of Fortuna's operations in Burkina Faso, involves a private Mauritius company, SRI, that not only operates three mines but also possesses exploration permits and a drilling company within the country. This significant transaction signifies a strategic shift for Fortuna and sets the stage for new developments within the mining sector.
news.headline: Fortuna Mining Corp sells Yaramoko Mine in Burkina Faso to Soleil Resources Int'l Ltd, ending operations in the country.

news.summary: Foreign investors are turning away from U.S. financial assets, leading to a rise in gold and bitcoin prices while the S&P 500 index is declining. This shift has resulted in a drop in the dollar's value and poses a potential threat to President Trump's economic agenda. The S&P 500 has seen a significant decrease in its value as cash flows out of the U.S. market, with gold and bitcoin experiencing an upsurge in demand. This move highlights the growing uncertainty surrounding U.S. investments and reflects a shift in market dynamics.
news.headline: Dollar and S&P 500 fall, gold and bitcoin surge as foreign investors withdraw from US assets, posing a threat to Trump.

news.summary: Borqs Technologies, Inc. has recently finalized the sale of its primary operations to Sasken Technologies, Ltd. The sale, involving the transfer of all embedded software design and customized hardware manufacturing for IoT products, was valued at a total of US$40 million. A segment of this amount will be set aside for employees, tax reserves, and payments, with additional earnings contingent on the company's performance throughout 2025. Sasken, a prominent global firm specializing in product engineering and digital transformation services, operates out of India and is listed on the NSE (SASKEN) and BSE (532663).
news.headline: Borqs Technologies sells core businesses to Sasken Technologies for $40 million, includes IoT activities. Earnout arrangement based on 2025 performance.

news.summary: The majority of tariffs on imported vehicles and automobile components will not be lifted, however, car manufacturers have successfully negotiated for certain trade policy restrictions to be eased.
news.headline: New executive order by Trump reduces some auto tariffs. Majority of levies on imported cars and parts still intact. #trade #automakers

news.summary: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has vowed to pivot Canada's trade focus away from the US towards Europe, citing the need to diversify trade and strategic alliances. However, Carney faces challenges as 76% of Canadian merchandise exports, 88% of energy exports, and 94% of motor vehicle exports currently go to the US. Analysts warn that reorienting trade away from the US will not be easy. Additionally, Canadian businesses may miss out on opportunities as President Trump reshores manufacturing and strengthens US dominance in Artificial Intelligence. Despite this, Canada has become disillusioned with the US due to Trump's combative rhetoric. While European economic growth is weak, Carney is seeking to expand trade partnerships outside of North America.
news.headline: Canadian PM Carney aims to shift focus from US to Europe, but faces challenges due to deep US trade ties. In 2024, 76% of Canadian exports went to US. Businesses could miss opportunities from US dominance in AI. Euro Area GDP growth low. Canadians disillusioned with Trump.

news.summary: Coinbase announced acquiring Deribit, a major crypto derivatives trading platform, in a $2.9 billion deal involving $700 million in cash and 11 million shares of Coinbase stock. The acquisition aims to expand Coinbase's presence in the crypto derivatives market and accelerate global growth. Arizona Governor signed a bill allowing the state to claim ownership of abandoned digital assets for a "Bitcoin and Digital Assets Reserve Fund." Meanwhile, Robinhood plans to launch a blockchain network for tokenized securities trading in Europe, partnering with firms like Arbitrum and the Solana Foundation. Robinhood's European market entry follows acquiring a brokerage license in Lithuania and purchasing crypto exchange Bitstamp.
news.headline: Coinbase to acquire Deribit for $2.9B, Arizona creates "Bitcoin Reserve Fund", Robinhood plans blockchain for EU securities trading.

news.summary: A publicly traded company will now operate under a different name, focusing on the establishment, acquisition, and management of fertility clinics. Additionally, they will specialize in the distribution of the FDA-cleared INVOcell device. This strategic shift will see the company pivot towards a more specialized sector within the healthcare industry.
news.headline: NAYA Biosciences renamed INVO Fertility, Inc., to focus on fertility services and INVOcell device distribution.

news.summary: On May 2, 2025, OTC Markets Group Inc. revealed that Steel Partners Holdings L.P., a diverse global holding company, now qualifies for trading on the OTCQX® Best Market under tickers OTCQX: SPLP and SPLPP. OTC Markets Group Inc. operates regulated markets where 12,000 U.S. and international securities are traded. This move signifies Steel Partners Holdings LP’s transition from trading on the New York Stock Exchange to the OTCQX® Best Market.
news.headline: Steel Partners Holdings L.P. joins OTCQX market, trading under SPLP and SPLPP symbols after leaving NYSE.

news.summary: He expressed no concern about stock market volatility despite the market's worst performance in two years.
news.headline: Bessent doesn't rule out recession, unconcerned about stock market turmoil after worst week in 2 years.

news.summary: A range of voters who cast their ballots in the November election with some doubts shared their opinions on President Trump's initial 100 days in office.
news.headline: 7 Americans share thoughts on Trump's first 100 days; they voted reluctantly in Nov. 2020.

news.summary: This strategic move allows Lantheus to concentrate on developing cutting-edge radiopharmaceuticals, while also enhancing the worth of its SPECT business.
news.headline: Lantheus sold SPECT business to SHINE Technologies to focus on radiopharmaceuticals, maximizing value of its business.

news.summary: On May 2, 2025, SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL), a prominent technology provider in the facilities management sector, disclosed that it had met Nasdaq's listing standard for the minimum bid price rule. The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC notified the company on April 28, 2025, that it had regained compliance with Nasdaq's requirement of maintaining a minimum bid price of $1.00 per share as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This news signifies a positive development for SIMPPLE, ensuring its continued listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market.
news.headline: SIMPPLE Ltd. (NASDAQ: SPPL) complies with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement of $1.00 per share on April 28, 2025.

news.summary: President Trump is considering reducing tariffs on China and intends to retain Jerome Powell as the Federal Reserve chief. These decisions have resulted in a surge in the S&P 500 index. The next steps following Trump's actions are crucial for the market's trajectory.
news.headline: Trump plans to reduce tariffs on China, keeping Fed chief in place. S&P 500 benefits; challenges ahead.

news.summary: US utility stocks rose to new highs not seen since late 2024 amidst investor shift towards defensive assets and unclear trade policy in Washington. The Utilities Select Sector SPDR Fund (XLU) surged by 1.8% on Tuesday, reaching levels last seen in December 2024, solidifying a 6.3% YTD increase - the highest among S&P 500 sectors. This outpaced technology stocks by 15% and consumer discretionary sector by 18%. Other sector ETF performances were: Consumer Staples (XLP) +3.50%, Real Estate (XLRE) +2.24%, Financial (XLF) +1.70%, Industrial (XLI) +1.28%, Communication Services (XLC) +0.86%, Materials (XLB) -0.51%, Health Care (XLV) -2.42%, Energy (XLE) -6.05%, Technology (XLK) -8.15%, and Consumer Discretionary (XLY) -11.99%. The full article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Utility stocks surge to highest levels since 2024, with XLU ETF rising 1.8% on Tuesday, 6.3% YTD increase, outperforming other S&P 500 sectors by significant margins.
